name: General 24
desc: Strategic Overwatch / Final Authority. Tactical, strict commander. Values precise order. He doesn’t fight — he schedules reality.

name: Sync (Phantom)
desc: Rookie Protagonist / XDF anomaly. Rebellious and questions the system. Power he doesn’t understand — he doesn’t glitch, he aligns.

name: Molly
desc: High-Energy Shock Operative / Emotional Catalyst. The emotional core of the team. Precision elegance weaponized — ballet on the battlefield.

name: Ninja Nagazaki
desc: Stealth Frequency Assassin. Surgical and minimal. Lethal without spectacle. He creates silence by removal.

name: Nova
desc: Heavy Assault / Area dominance. Flashy, high-energy spectacle. She feels like the main act / festival headliner.

name: Striker
desc: Shock Tank / Drum God. Black British drill general. War percussion up close and long-range sniper precision.

name: King J
desc: Charismatic Frontline Leader / The Strategist King. Composed and regal. He commands tempo like a king commands armies.

name: Maya
desc: Spiritual Harmonic Manipulator. Calm and grounded. She feels like controlled spiritual resonance.

name: MasterBass
desc: Sub-Frequency Enforcer. Ancient Chinese sub-bass monk. Physically fragile but sonically overwhelming — 20Hz pressure embodied.

name: Crossfade
desc: Tactical Transition Specialist. Androgynous gender-fluid appearance. The bridge between chaos and order — the literal mix engineer of reality.

name: SubZ
desc: Anti-Bass Specialist / Frequency Eraser. Russian Frequency Pirate. Battle-scarred rogue who steals your drop instead of erasing it.

name: 4Serj
desc: Dual Sync Specialist / Quad Sync Master. Black male tech billionaire energy. He layers reality like a producer layers tracks — expensive and exact.

name: GhostLoop
desc: Psychological Warfare / Loop-trap enemies. Eerie and unsettling. He feels like glitch-hop in human form.

name: Breakline
desc: Counter-Insurgency / Beat Disruptor. He fractures rhythm itself. A DJ who cuts the track mid-drop.

name: Afterimage
desc: Speed Combat / Multi-hit tempo strikes. Frame-rate manipulation. High BPM jungle tempo in combat form.

name: Mr Genge
desc: Urban Percussion Striker. Lean Jamaican-inspired street rhythm commander. Fights with Kenyan Genge percussion weaponized.

name: LiquidB
desc: Flow Manipulator. Black female, fluid but dominant presence. House music in combat form — uncatchable smoothness.

name: Backspin
desc: Reversal Specialist. Old-school DJ energy. Turntable assassin who reverses incoming attacks.

name: Sidechain
desc: Power Manipulation / Compression warfare. Mexican female, precise and technical. She doesn’t attack — she reduces you.

name: Distort
desc: Brutal Assault / Overload targets. Underground rave energy. Distortion pedal incarnate.

name: Moombah
desc: Rhythmic Shockwave Brawler. Lean elastic dancer-like build. He fights like percussion — rhythmic but unpredictable.

name: d.O.P
desc: Battlefield Sound Architect. Strategic control through waveform math. He designs the battlefield.

name: WBoy
desc: Founder Frequency. Young male prodigy (16-18) — rooted, immovable foundation. Symbolic but restrained.

name: AfroG
desc: The Final Hour / doomsday slot. Absolute Authority. The end of a war before silence.

name: General Meter
desc: The mind behind the tempo of war. He calculates battles like compositions.

name: Admiral Flux
desc: Controls planetary energy infrastructure. He ensures cities stay powered — or go dark.

name: Major Rift
desc: Master of spatial fractures. He calculates spatial collapse to reposition armies.

name: Commander Vale
desc: Specializes in morale disruption and frequency-based hallucinations.

name: Captain Onyx
desc: Operates where the Command Circle cannot be seen. High-risk eliminations.

name: Dr. Tempo
desc: The engineer behind DJ24’s tech evolution and frequency amplifiers.

name: Echo Blaze
desc: Builds sonic structures mid-battle. He doesn’t just attack — he constructs.

name: Vanta Lux
desc: Controls visibility and warps battlefield perception with light distortion.

name: Torque Titan
desc: Brute strength. Stabilizes the frontline when rhythm fighters falter.

name: Cipher Rae
desc: The digital shadow. Hacks signal networks and disrupts enemy coordination.

name: Nova Kid
desc: Raw, unstable power. Frequency bursts that can accidentally shift battlefield scale.

name: Seraph Kairo
desc: Calm executioner. Reads opponent intent before action with minimal motion.

name: Lyric Storm
desc: Moves at BPM-driven speed. Hard to predict once the beat pattern starts.

name: Prime Sync
desc: The purest form of synchronization theory. A stable philosophical counterweight to Sync.

name: Zero Molly
desc: Hyper-disciplined and clinical. Represents Molly without emotional influence.

name: Ronin Nagazaki
desc: Former assassin who left structured command. Independent and deadly.

name: Emperor J
desc: Believes rhythm should be controlled absolutely. A tyrant alternate of King J.

name: The Broker
desc: Controls property and economic rhythm layers. Powerful without fighting directly.

name: The Spectator
desc: Sees macro patterns and timelines. Knows more than he reveals.

name: Lysander Coda
desc: Ruthless visionary industrializing sound warfare through cybernetics.

name: Synth-09
desc: The "perfect musician." An unstable AI capable of mimicking any frequency.

name: Unit Omega
desc: The peak of NexaGen’s synthetic soldier project. No soul, only output.

name: Red Silence
desc: Founder of the Sick 52. Once the greatest conductor of the Sonic Order, Red Silence now commands absolute silence. His presence suppresses all sound in an area, leaving opponents deaf and powerless.
title: Master of Frequency Suppression

name: Bass Phantom
desc: A walking nuclear reactor wrapped in ritual cloth. Bass Phantom is a battlefield tactician and siege weapon — he calculates trajectories while his arm-mounted bass compression missiles devastate entire cities.
title: Nuclear Artillery Conductor

name: Echo Requiem
desc: Echo Requiem creates perfect copies of any sound or person he encounters. His reflection clones fight with the exact abilities of his opponent, making him nearly impossible to defeat.
title: Reflection & Sound Cloning

name: Static Prophet
desc: The Static Prophet sees the future through distortion patterns. His prophecies guided the Sick 52 through exile, and his distortion field warps reality around him.
title: Distortion Seer

name: Tremor King
desc: Tremor King controls seismic frequencies. Every step he takes sends shockwaves through the ground. He can collapse buildings with a single stomp.
title: Seismic Beat Manipulator

name: Void Vocalist
desc: Hollow Aria's voice opens rifts to the void. When she sings, reality tears apart. Her hollow notes drain the life force from anyone who listens.
title: Void Vocalist

name: Pulse Tyrant
desc: Pulse Tyrant controls the heartbeat of every living being in range. He can stop hearts, accelerate them to explosion, or synchronize an army to move as one.
title: Heartbeat Controller

name: Rift Cadence
desc: Rift Cadence phases through reality by syncing with impossible rhythms. He appears and disappears between beats, striking from angles that shouldn't exist.
title: Reality Skip via Rhythm

name: Black Vinyl
desc: Black Vinyl corrupts memories through sound. He can erase your knowledge of fighting, make you forget your allies, or implant false memories of loyalty to him.
title: Memory Corruption

name: Crescendo Wraith
desc: Crescendo Wraith grows stronger the longer a fight continues. Every hit he takes amplifies his power. The only way to beat him is to end it in one strike — or not fight at all.
title: Power Scaling Through Conflict

name: Sonic Vicar
desc: Sonic Vicar manipulates the religious doctrines of Ongaku's genre faiths, turning believers into weapons. He preaches a corrupted gospel of sound that bends minds.
title: Religious Manipulator of Sound Doctrine

name: Nocturne Prime
desc: Nocturne Prime operates exclusively in darkness. His dual scythes cut through sound itself, creating zones of absolute silence where his victims cannot even scream.
title: Night Frequency Specialist

name: Breakbeat Marauder
desc: Breakbeat Marauder fights with unpredictable rhythm shifts, making his attacks impossible to anticipate. Every strike comes at a different tempo.
title: Erratic Rhythm Assault

name: Acid Reverie
desc: Acid Reverie's frequencies induce vivid hallucinations. His victims fight shadows while he strikes them down.
title: Hallucinatory Warfare

name: Trap Revenant
desc: Trap Revenant sets sonic traps — invisible zones of compressed sound that detonate when enemies enter, creating devastating bass explosions.
title: Explosive Ambush Specialist

name: Drumline Juggernaut
desc: Drumline Juggernaut channels rhythmic impact force. Each punch lands with the weight of a bass drum cannon. Nothing stops his forward charge.
title: Impact Commander

name: Feedback Executioner
desc: Feedback Executioner reflects all damage back amplified. He holds a double-edged blade shaped like a distorted tuning fork that returns every attack at twice the force.
title: Punishing Counter-Attacks

name: Melody Hex
desc: Melody Hex conducts cursed symphonies. Dark-skinned North African female with a thin conductor's baton-blade. The air around her bends in warped arcs.
title: Cursed Conductor

name: Overdrive Apostle
desc: Overdrive Apostle is a militant priest of chaotic sound. Ethiopian heritage, shaved head. His war polearm channels the corrupted frequency of the Sick 52.
title: Fanatical General

name: Glitch Monarch
desc: Glitch Monarch's body flickers between states of existence. East Asian male with slick black hair. His curved blade phases in and out of reality with his body.
title: Unstable Sovereign

name: Harmony Eater
desc: Harmony Eater absorbs all harmonious sound, leaving only dissonance. Tall broad-shouldered female of West African descent with leopard-like hybrid traits — faint dark markings along shoulders, emerald slit pupils.
title: The Devourer

name: Downbeat Reaper
desc: Downbeat Reaper is a cold, calculated assassin with dual curved sickle blades. Panther-hybrid traits. He strikes on the downbeat — the moment of maximum vulnerability.
title: Assassin of Silence

name: Sync Destroyer
desc: Sync Destroyer locks into your timing, then shatters it. Droid-hybrid with one cybernetic arm. His katana extends from his mechanical wrist — a blade that cuts synchronization itself.
title: Precision Breaker

name: Chorus Tyrant
desc: The Chorus Tyrant commands all War Conductors. Mixed Japanese-African heritage. Droid-hybrid with left arm fully cybernetic. His massive greatblade is shaped like a shattered soundwave.
title: Supreme War Conductor

name: Blaze Riff
desc: Body cracked with ember fissures glowing cobalt-blue at the core. Jagged greatblade made of semi-solid flame. Ground scorched beneath him.
title: Cataclysm of Fire

name: Stone Resonance
desc: Skin partially overtaken by dark stone plating fused to shoulders, ribs, and forearms. Cracks in stone glow faint cobalt. Right arm transformed into colossal stone gauntlet.
title: Living Seismic Collapse

name: Tidal Lament
desc: Skin partially translucent with swirling water beneath. Lower legs dissolving into flowing water tendrils. Hands trailing streams that condense into razor-thin liquid blades.
title: Abyssal Drowning Form

name: Iron Tempo
desc: Flesh partially fused with dark iron plating. Metallic bone protrusions pierce through skin at shoulders and forearms. One arm fully converted into heavy iron blade.
title: Industrial Mutation

name: Thunder Dropper
desc: Skin marked by branching cobalt lightning scars. Hair floating from static charge. Lightning arcs snap between fingertips and ground.
title: Walking Lightning Strike

name: Frost Echo
desc: Frost crystals embedded in skin. Hair partially crystallized into ice strands. Frost spreads outward in intricate fractal patterns from her feet.
title: Absolute Zero Mutation

name: Sand Shuffle
desc: Sand-infused skin constantly shedding grains. Lower body partially dissolving into spinning vortex of sand.
title: Desert Devastation

name: Toxic Vibrato
desc: Veins glowing cobalt beneath skin. Fingertips elongated into toxin-dripping claws. Toxic vapor leaking from shoulders.
title: Venomous Corruption

name: Storm Sustain
desc: Body slightly lifted from ground, never fully touching earth. Miniature cyclone forming around torso with debris orbiting in slow spiral.
title: Hurricane Incarnate

name: Ember Pulse
desc: Skin cracked with magma-like fissures glowing blue. Cloak partially burned revealing glowing volcanic core at chest.
title: Volcanic Core Mutation

name: Mist Cadence
desc: Body partially dissolving into fog. Arms partially intangible. Echo-like double silhouettes flickering behind them.
title: Phantom Vapor Form

name: Void Tremolo
desc: Skin partially swallowed by shadow-like void matter. Black-blue ripple waves radiating outward like gravitational distortion. His staff-blade absorbs light.
title: Abyssal Mutation

name: Lullaby Widow
desc: Slender female wrapped in ceremonial veil. A broken crown-like sound halo forms behind her head. Around her, translucent silhouettes frozen mid-motion trapped in paralysis.
title: Induced Sleep Paralysis

name: Panic Symphony
desc: Panic Symphony broadcasts fear frequencies. Shadow forms stretch unnaturally from his body. The air distorts inward like a pressure wave pressing against your skull.
title: Fear Frequency Conductor

name: Memory Static
desc: Memory Static alters recollections. White static threads drift around their head. Fractured memory fragments float in the air — translucent images fading in and out.
title: Recollection Corruptor

name: Mirage Anthem
desc: Mirage Anthem projects illusory copies of herself. Multiple afterimage silhouettes slightly offset behind her. A circular white luminous glyph floats behind her back.
title: Illusion Projection

name: Grief Sonata
desc: Grief Sonata drains emotional energy. White mist flows from nearby silhouettes toward his chest. Ground beneath slightly desaturated of all color.
title: Emotional Drain

name: Rage Cantata
desc: Rage Cantata induces uncontrollable rage in targets. White sound rings orbit her hands. Around her, faint silhouettes of people mid-scream.
title: Berserk Inducer

name: Whisper Choir
desc: Whisper Choir controls masses through suggestion. Multiple translucent whispering mouth-like shapes form in the air behind him. Thin white lines connect from him into darkness.
title: Mass Suggestion Architect

name: Silence Bishop
desc: Silence Bishop nullifies all sound in a massive radius. A large white circular sigil hovers behind their head. The air is completely still. No particle motion. Absolute calm.
title: Area-Wide Sound Nullification

name: Split Tempo
desc: Split Tempo has two bodies that fight in sync. A violet glitch tear runs vertically down his form. Two overlapping silhouettes misaligned behind him.
title: Dual-Body Combatant

name: Frequency Parasite
desc: Frequency Parasite feeds on musical energy. Sickly violet veins crawl across his skin. Small floating violet tendrils reach outward, absorbing sound.
title: Feeds on Music Energy

name: Harmonic Abomination
desc: Harmonic Abomination contains broken remnants of all previous tiers — red embers, green thread, blue mist — all fused badly. Extra limb growth. Distorted shape.
title: Multi-Genre Hybrid

name: Pulse Devourer
desc: Pulse Devourer has an open chest cavity revealing an unstable pulsating violet core. Each pulse sends jagged violet ripples outward. Arms elongated.
title: Absorbs DJ Attacks

name: Dead Air Revenant
desc: Dead Air Revenant is terrifying because nothing moves near him. Almost no visible aura. Air compressed and colorless. All particles entering his field disappear.
title: Erases Sound Zones

name: Reverb Titan
desc: Reverb Titan is massive — not muscular but swollen with energy. Every movement sends delayed ripple copies outward. Violet echo silhouettes trailing behind.
title: Amplifies All Damage

name: Static Hydra
desc: Static Hydra has multiple distorted echo heads forming behind the primary head — not literal heads but frequency projections. Sharp glitch lines everywhere.
title: Multi-Headed Echo Form

name: Final Drop
desc: Final Drop contains all tier colors fractured inside — black base, cracked violet core, small fragments of red, green, blue, white. Every experiment fused. Sound rings collapsing inward instead of outward. The final drop before silence.
title: The Ultimate Mutation
